channel.title: vim on Blog of Jason Meridth
channel.description: Recent content in vim on Blog of Jason Meridth

item.title: Gocode Vim Plugin and Go Modules
item.description: Update: My friend Eli Uriegas let me know that you don’t need gocode anymore since vim-go has autocompletion.

item.title: Docker Daemon Error When Running Docker Compose
item.description: TL;DR Make sure you don’t have any old mounted volumes around if you see the error below.

item.title: Ubuntu - set caps lock to escape
item.description: I just got a new laptop and had to google again on how to set caps lock key to escape (I’m a Vim user).

item.title: Vim Tagbar Plugin
item.description: I found the tagbar Vim plugin last night and finally tried it out this morning.

item.title: Personal VIM Cheatsheet
item.description: Originally posted on 03-03-2014 and continually updated Will be adding to this post as I learn/remember shortcuts

item.title: Set VIM as Default Editor
item.description: Environment: Ubuntu sudo update-alternatives --config editor OUTPUT: There are 4 choices for the alternative editor (providing /usr/bin/editor).
